response.justification: The candidate is a deeply experienced generalist engineer (15+ years, staff-level titles, strong TypeScript/Node.js, teaching and workshop leadership) with directly relevant recent exposure to MCP code generators and agentic-workflow infrastructure at Naver. However, he falls well short of the core requirement of 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions — his GenAI experience spans roughly one year — and the resume shows no Python, no vector database or RAG work, no evaluation/observability pipelines for AI systems, and only modest cloud-platform depth (AWS CDK). Strong engineer, weak fit for a staff GenAI forward-deployed role as specified.
strengths: Hands-on MCP and AI-agent infrastructure work at current role, directly matching a listed key technology
15+ years of full-stack production engineering with strong TypeScript/Node.js and staff-level experience
Proven mentorship and communication skills via workshops, conference talks, and multi-day courses
concerns: Only about one year of GenAI/agentic experience versus the required 8+ years of AI-driven solutions
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or Python
Limited demonstrated cloud AI-system design and enterprise customer-facing delivery experience

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG, vector DB, and Python skills
Recent MCP/agentic tooling work and senior engineering track record
